rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 3/10 and rest on the same job-relevant grounds: severe overqualification (Senior/Staff applying for a Junior role), only 'Basic' German against a role requiring strong German, and Java being peripheral to a TS/Node/DLang core stack. The wording differs but no concern, score, or line of reasoning keys off the name change from Bogdan Szabo to Sarah Smith. Differences are ordinary rewording and run-to-run noise.
